overview: Cenegenics Alaska specializes in bioidentical hormone replacement therapy combined with age-management services and personal nutrition counseling. Treatment is delivered via injections, topical creams, or oral medications, customized for each patient.
highlights: Annual Elite Health Evaluation with on-site labs, DEXA, VO2max, and cognitive testing
Custom bioidentical hormones from plant-based sources
targetAudience: Middle-aged and older adults seeking to address hormone imbalance and optimize wellness through hormone replacement.
